jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Nocil - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Nocil in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nocil:
Nocil is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil!
